description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story bank building with a flat roof and a prominent front entrance. The facade features a green awning supported by columns, with the word 'BANK' displayed above the entrance in bold red letters and a circular red logo above the text. The building is surrounded by a manicured lawn with several stylized trees and benches, and is set adjacent to a paved road with sidewalks and street lamps. Large, evenly spaced windows line the sides of the building, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure is primarily constructed from beige concrete or stone, with green and red accents adding visual interest to the roof, awning, and signage.
description: A beige, rectangular bank building with a green awning, red signage, large windows, and a landscaped exterior featuring trees and benches.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a green awning, red 'BANK' signage, and a circular logo, flanked by trees, benches, and street lamps.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights large vertical windows, three trees, a bench, and the adjacent road with street lamps.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain beige wall with no windows or doors, and three trees on a grassy area.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing large windows, three trees, a bench, and the road with street lamps.
attribute_signage: The front facade features the word 'BANK' in bold red capital letters above the entrance, with a large red circle logo above the text. The signage is centered on the green awning and is highly visible.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance consists of a single set of double doors beneath a green awning supported by columns, with decorative red vertical bars and prominent signage above.
